strengths: 15+ years of software engineering across diverse domains (web, mobile, embedded, infrastructure) with demonstrated technical breadth
Entrepreneurial experience as founder of GISCollective since 2016, showing ability to build and sustain technical products
Current AI-adjacent work with MCP code generators and agentic workflows at re:cinq demonstrates emerging interest in AI strategy
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML products, platforms, or deep expertise—critical gap for a principal role focused on AI strategy
No evidence of director-level strategic leadership, customer advisory, or experience shaping future product direction at scale
Missing preferred qualifications: no Master's or PhD in AI/ML, and AI experience limited to recent months at current role
response.justification: Candidate meets bare minimum qualifications (15 years experience, BS in Computer Science) and demonstrates solid technical execution across multiple domains. Entrepreneurial experience as GISCollective founder is a positive signal. However, the role requires demonstrated AI/ML expertise with built products or platforms—the resume shows only recent MCP work without proven depth. More critically, there is no evidence of director-level strategic leadership, architectural vision, or experience advising strategic customers on emerging technologies. The candidate's background suggests strong senior engineer potential in cloud infrastructure or backend systems, but insufficient AI specialization and strategic scope for this principal-level AI-strategy position.
